indicators.name: high ceiling beams
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can make it difficult to focus on tasks requiring concentration.

indicators.name: exposed concrete structure
indicators.rationale: Exposed concrete structure may be visually distracting and does not provide a sense of enclosure.

indicators.name: lack of furniture
indicators.rationale: No flat work surface or seating makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The high ceiling and exposed concrete structure create a sense of openness and lack of enclosure, which can be distracting. Additionally, the absence of furniture such as a desk or chair makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation. However, the lighting appears to be adequate for task illumination.
